ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., TREB Total, Halton Region) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income in the region */,
  "median_household_income" REAL /* Median household income in the region */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the region was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the region's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the property is located */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., SingleFamilyDetached, SingleFamilyAttached, TownHouse, Apartment) */,
  "composite_index" REAL /* Composite index of the property */,
  "composite_price" REAL /* Price of the property */,
  "composite_change" REAL /* Change in price of the property */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the data was collected */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "square_feet" REAL /* Total square footage of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_sold_date" TEXT /* Date the property was last sold */,
  "last_sold_price" REAL /* Price at which the property was last sold */,
  "listing_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing agent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the property was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the property's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_listing_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the index belongs to */,
  "index_value" REAL /* Value of the market index */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in the market index */,
  "index_type" TEXT /* Type of market index (e.g., Composite, Single-Family, Condo) */,
  "index_date" TEXT /* Date the market index was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the market index was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the market index data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_indices_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "agent_email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "agent_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the agent was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the agent's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_data, edit_data, delete_data) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (foreign key to users table) */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission (foreign key to permissions table) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was assigned to the user */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission_id")
)
